fair_value_today.basis: base case (Metis) intrinsic value — the anchor, not a weighted blend

fair_value_12m.basis: #1 rolled forward at r=10.0% less dividend 0.0

detail.multiple_rationale: At $204 base fair value, the honest intrinsic convergence target in 12m is $204 x 1.10 = $224. However, Daedalus documents a justified 12m target of 28x FY2027 EPS of $10.37 = $290 — reflecting: (1) the $364bn contracted backlog is a hard, company-filed fact that the market will continue to reprice over the next 4 quarters as it converts to revenue; (2) AWS re-acceleration to 28% (the fastest in 15 quarters) in Q1 2026 is a verifiable data point that reduces the deceleration risk the bear case rests on; (3) the 14.7% pullback from the all-time high to $237.50 provides a technical entry within the bull-bear range ($145-$244); (4) 28x on FY2027 EPS reflects a MODEST re-rating toward the lower end of the post-Q1 analyst cluster (JPMorgan uses 32x), which is defensible given the capex cycle FCF risk. This is NOT engineered to produce a BUY — it produces a HOLD, which is the honest verdict when the base fair value sits 14% below price but contracted demand evidence is strong enough to keep the target within the analyst range.

conviction.label: MEDIUM
conviction.basis: action BUY: Daedalus assigned MEDIUM (evidence read across base/bull/bear) -> MEDIUM

bridge_logic: #1 fair value today 211.64 -> #3 fair value 12m 232.8 (x(1+0.100) - div 0.0); #4 target 12m 290.36 (defensible_multiple); implied return to #4 = 22.3%, to #3 = -2.0%, to street mean None = None%
